title: All 5 Supporting Actress Nominees at the 2026 Oscars, Ranked
text: Collider's 2026 ranking of Best Supporting Actress nominees from worst to best: 5. Elle Fanning in Sentimental Value portrays Rachel Kemp, a Hollywood actress, and gives one of her best performances yet in a role that asks her to be vulnerable. 4. Wunmi Mosaku in Sinners plays Annie with real complexity while maintaining easy certainty. 3. Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas in Sentimental Value as Agnes grounds the film with open, wonderfully warm performance. 2. Amy Madigan in Weapons as Aunt Gladys balances physical frailty with seemingly indomitable will, delivering calm cruelty. 1. Teyana Taylor in One Battle After Another embodies revolutionary Perfidia Beverly Hills with intoxicating charisma. The article notes that all five nominees are fantastic and actually supporting players, which is refreshing. Any one of them would be a worthy winner.
